Réunion du CIML2025October 13, 2025

🇫🇷 Paris, France

60th CIML Meeting — Resolutions (EN)

DOI de la réunion10.63493/meetings/ciml60
URN de la réunionurn:oiml:ciml:meeting:ciml-60

Ordre du jour

PointTitreRésultat
1Opening remarks and roll callDiscuté
2Adoption of the agendaAdopté
3Minutes of the 59th CIML MeetingDiscuté
4Report by the CIML PresidentDiscuté
5Report by the BIML Director on BIML matters and activitiesDiscuté
6Financial mattersDiscuté
6.12024 accountsDiscuté
6.2Arrears of Member States and Corresponding MembersDiscuté
6.3Budget forecast for 2025Discuté
6.4Member State and Corresponding Member classes and feesDiscuté
6.5Proposed budget for the 2026–2029 financial periodDiscuté
7OIML publications and technical activitiesDiscuté
7.1Publications for approval by the CIMLDiscuté
7.2Project proposals for approval by the CIMLDiscuté
7.3Other technical items for information and approvalDiscuté
7.4OIML publications and communicationsDiscuté
8OIML Certification System (OIML-CS)Discuté
8.1Report by the OIML-CS MC ChairpersonDiscuté
8.2Recommendations from the OIML-CS MC to the CIMLDiscuté
9CEEMS Advisory Group (CEEMS AG)Discuté
10OIML Digitalization Task Group (OIML DTG)Discuté
11Preparation of the 17th OIML ConferenceDiscuté
11.1Nominations for the Presidency of the 17th ConferenceDiscuté
11.2Review of the draft agenda for the 17th ConferenceDiscuté
12Review and approval of draft CIML resolutions (sessions 1 and 2)Adopté
13Review of the Resolutions of the 17th ConferenceDiscuté
14International cooperationDiscuté
14.1Report by the RLMO Round Table ChairpersonDiscuté
14.2Report on OIML activities with organizations in liaisonDiscuté
14.3Updates by other organizations in liaisonDiscuté
14.4Cooperation with the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate ChangeDiscuté
15OIML AwardsDiscuté
16Future meetingsDiscuté
16.161st CIML Meeting (2026)Discuté
16.262nd CIML Meeting (2027)Discuté
17Any other businessDiscuté
18Review and approval of draft CIML resolutions (session 3)Adopté
19Closing remarksDiscuté

Resolution CIML/2025/01
OIML

Organisation Internationale de Métrologie Légale

La métrologie légale — la pratique et la science de la mesure qui touche au commerce, à la santé, à la sécurité et à l'environnement.
